summary: Iteration 264 - SmartDock Consult Overlay Testing Complete. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All core features verified including Consult button with SolfeggioGlow SVG, semi-transparent overlay, context-aware sovereign selection, 10-member dropdown, chat functionality with AI responses, and cross-member bridging.

issues: Console warning: '<circle> attribute r: Expected length, undefined' - framer-motion SVG attribute animation issue. Does not affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: SovereignConsultOverlay.js: PAGE_SOVEREIGN_MAP correctly maps routes to sovereigns (/economy → principal_economist, /star-chart → astraeus, /wellness → zenith, etc.)
SovereignConsultOverlay.js: Context-aware selection respects access restrictions - falls back to first accessible member if context sovereign is locked
SovereignConsultOverlay.js: SolfeggioGlow SVG renders correctly with hexagonal ring (polygon), inner triangle (polygon), and center circle
SmartDock.js: Consult button integrated with data-testid='dock-consult' and SolfeggioGlow overlay
SmartDock.js: consultOpen state properly toggles overlay visibility
SmartDock.js: SovereignConsultOverlay receives pathname prop for context-aware selection
Backend sovereigns.py: All 10 council members (5 advisors + 5 faculty) with correct structure
Backend sovereigns.py: Chat endpoint returns AI response with knowledge_tier and bridges
Backend sovereigns.py: Utility tools have 10% discount (UTILITY_DISCOUNT_RATE = 0.10)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with purchased sessions for Grand Architect, Master Harmonic, Principal Economist, Chief Logistics
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 264 verified SmartDock Consult integration: (1) Consult button (data-testid='dock-consult') has SolfeggioGlow SVG with 2 polygons (hexagonal ring + inner triangle) and 1 circle (center pulse). (2) Clicking opens semi-transparent overlay (data-testid='consult-overlay') sliding from right. (3) Context-aware selection: /economy → Principal Economist, /star-chart → Astraeus (falls back if locked). (4) Member selector dropdown shows all 10 council members with locked ones dimmed. (5) Chat input (data-testid='consult-input') and send button (data-testid='consult-send-btn') work. (6) AI responses include sovereign name label and cross-member bridging [BRIDGE:member_id]. (7) Close button (data-testid='consult-close-btn') closes overlay. (8) Test user has sessions with Grand Architect, Master Harmonic, Principal Economist, Chief Logistics; free access to Sovereign Ethicist; no access to Astraeus, Zenith, Aurelius, Gaea, Vesta.

solfeggio_glow_svg.details: SVG with viewBox 0 0 28 28, 2 polygons (hexagonal ring + inner triangle), 1 circle (center pulse)

consult_overlay_opens.details: data-testid='consult-overlay' appears on click, slides from right

context_aware_starchart.details: On /star-chart, falls back to accessible member (Astraeus locked for Discovery tier)

member_selector_dropdown.details: Shows all 10 council members, locked ones dimmed

chat_input_send.details: Chat input and send button work, AI response received

ai_response_with_name.details: AI response shows sovereign name label

backend_sovereigns_chat.details: Returns AI response with knowledge_tier and bridges

backend_sovereigns_utilities.details: Returns 5 utility tools with ownership status
